THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REICH, CATHERINE AKA CATHY REICH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 328 SANCHEZ ST (COTTAGE), S.F. $3,100.00 RENT, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,113.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-20-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED TILL 5PM JULY 20, 1997 (SUNDAY) AFTER WHICH PARTIES SHALL INSPECT PREMISES AND DEFT GIVES KEYS TO PLTF. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. $400- SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED. PLTF MAY FILE SUIT FOR DAMAGES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
